prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime-style illustration of a solitary teenage boy floating or standing weightlessly inside the eye of a massive typhoon, viewed from a high, tilted cinematic angle. The scene is a swirling ocean-and-cloud vortex forming a huge spiral tunnel around him, with bright sunlight breaking through the storm clouds near the center and dark blue storm water around the edges. The character is shown in three-quarter back view with messy windblown dark brown hair, a calm downward gaze, and a slightly melancholic mood; keep the face mostly turned away or softly obscured. He wears a loose white sailor-style shirt with thin gold trim, dark knee-length shorts, socks, rugged lace-up boots, and a dark necktie or scarf whipping violently in the wind. Add strong storm motion: diagonal rain streaks, wind-torn clothing, turbulent foamy waves, and glossy suspended raindrops in the foreground and background with depth-of-field blur. Use highly detailed painterly anime rendering, luminous clouds, realistic water texture, silver-blue color grading, high contrast, and a poetic weather-poster atmosphere. Place elegant white cursive handwritten text across the middle-left to center reading Winds roar. We shine brighter. Stay safe. The sky will open again.. In the lower-right corner add small white serif date text reading June 3, 2026 and beneath it a white cursive signature reading Oyagi. Keep the composition clean, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, no borders, no extra logos, no additional text.
